---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Include API design ideas if you have them.

```typescript
// Example of how the new API might look
engine.newFeature({ ... });
```

## OCPP Spec Reference
If relevant, link to the OCPP specification section (1.6 / 2.0.1 / 2.1).

## Alternatives Considered
Are there ways to achieve this today without the feature? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Additional Context
Any other context, examples, or references.
